ideal_must_detect.matched_text: trading blackout from 01 June 2026 until 30 minutes after the conclusion of the Board meeting scheduled for 30 June 2026

any investor interaction must rely solely on information already disseminated through an exchange filing or published on the Company’s website; sharing internal draft decks or customer churn analyses is not permitted
no communication is to be made to analysts or media prior to such filing
do not request Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN unless strictly mandated by law or KYC rules applicable to that transaction, and never store images of government IDs without necessity and retention limits
avoid collecting DOB where age gating can be achieved by a yes/no declaration
do not collect personal emails of minors in promotions
This note intentionally excludes live financial figures and any client-identifiable content
